body.description: Verification data including phone_number/email, OTP, verification value, and reCAPTCHA token

email.description: Email associated with the receiver in the SDP database. Either `phone_number` or `email` is required.

phone_number.description: Phone number associated with the receiver in the SDP database. Either `phone_number` or `email` is required.

verification.description: Verification value provided by the user
